text_template: Megan Rapinoe here. This week is our last regular episode of A Touch More before I kick off a limited series, A Touch More, The Beautiful Game, a special series for the World Cup featuring in-depth interviews with some of soccer's biggest stars. But for this week, we are closing out the Arrow with a special compilation episode featuring our absolute favorite moments and themes from our last 90 episodes of A Touch More. Check out the latest episode of A Touch More wherever you get your podcasts.
outro_variants: Check out the latest episode of A Touch More wherever you get your podcasts.
